entry.title: IDC N0001913D0007 (P00036) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS ACTION IS TO CHANGE THE ORDER DATE TO CONFORM WITH THE DATE SPECIFIED IN THE CONTRACT, WHICH IS FOR CONTRACTOR LOGISTICS SERVICES.
PID# N61340-19-NORFP-PMA-273-0192

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0001913D0007 (P00038) awarded to L3 TECHNOLOGIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THIS CONTRACT ACTION IS FOR THE CONTRACTOR LOGISTICS SUPPORT ("CLS") OF TH-57 AIRCRAFT. THE CLS EFFORT ENTAILS OPERATIONAL-, INTERMEDIATE- AND DEPOT-LEVEL (OR O-, I-, AND D-LEVEL, RESPECTIVELY) REQUIREMENTS RELATING IN VARYING DEGREES TO AIRCRAFT AT NAS WHITING FIELD AND PATUXENT RIVER.
PID #: N61340-19-NORFP-PMA-273-0253

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
